Homepage.title: Free Online Tools
Homepage.subtitle: Essential utilities for developers, designers, and professionals. Generate UUIDs, convert timestamps, encode URLs, create secure passwords, process images, manipulate text and more - all free and privacy-focused.
Homepage.developmentDesc: Code editors, frameworks, and development tools
Homepage.privacyDescription: All tools run locally in your browser. No data is sent to servers, ensuring your privacy and security.
Homepage.seoDescription: Discover powerful free online tools including password generators, Base64 encoders, UUID generators, and more. Boost your productivity.
Homepage.seoKeywords: online tools, free tools, password generator, Base64, UUID, developer tools

Tools.title: All Tools
Tools.subtitle: Discover and explore our complete collection of tools
Tools.seoDescription: Browse our complete collection of free online tools. Including password generators, encoders/decoders, formatters, and more.
Tools.seoKeywords: online tools, developer tools, password generator, encoder, formatter, UUID generator

uuidGenerator.title: UUID Generator
uuidGenerator.description: Generate unique identifiers for your applications with batch support

warnings.largeBatch: Generating a large batch of UUIDs may take some time.

passwordGenerator.title: Password Generator
passwordGenerator.description: Generate secure passwords with customizable options

warnings.noCharacterSet: Please select at least one character set.
warnings.shortPassword: Passwords shorter than 8 characters are not recommended.
warnings.weakPassword: Consider including symbols and numbers for better security.

timestampConverter.title: Timestamp Converter
timestampConverter.description: Convert between timestamp and human-readable date formats

errors.invalidTimestamp: Invalid timestamp. Please enter a valid number.
errors.invalidDate: Invalid date format. Please check your input.

warnings.oldTimestamp: This timestamp appears to be from before the year 2000.
warnings.futureTimestamp: This timestamp appears to be more than a year in the future.

urlEncoder.title: URL Encoder/Decoder
urlEncoder.description: Encode and decode URLs for web development

errors.invalidUrl: Invalid URL format for decoding. Please check your input.
errors.encodeFailed: Failed to encode URL. Please try again.

warnings.longUrl: Very long URL. Consider shortening for better compatibility.
warnings.alreadyDecoded: This URL appears to already be decoded.

whatsMyIp.title: What's My IP
whatsMyIp.description: Check your public IP address and location information
whatsMyIp.privacyNotice: Your IP information is fetched from a third-party service. No data is stored on our servers.

errors.fetchFailed: Failed to fetch IP information. Please check your connection and try again.

base64Encoder.title: Base64 Encoder/Decoder
base64Encoder.description: Encode and decode Base64 strings for data transmission

errors.invalidBase64: Invalid Base64 input. Please check your input and try again.
errors.encodeFailed: Failed to encode input. Please try again.

warnings.largeOutput: Large Base64 output. Consider splitting for better readability.
warnings.nonPrintableCharacters: Decoded result contains non-printable characters. This might be binary data.
